prestazioni: Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II with a billet compressor wheel (58mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and a 64mm turbine wheel, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe (engine code: LF17 2.5L Turbo Skyactiv-G, stock turbo: TD04-12T) to support 350-400whp on E85 fuel with a Cobb Accessport Stage 3+ tune (custom dyno-tuned map by stratified auto tuning for precise AFR and ignition timing control).

Full bolt-on fuel system upgrade: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors, Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup with -8AN lines, and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump with a Radium Engineering surge tank to prevent fuel starvation during aggressive cornering (critical for the CX-9's transverse engine layout).

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (24-way rebound, 16-way compression, adjustable top mounts) paired with Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and poly bushings, along with a custom front strut tower brace by Cusco for chassis rigidity (CX-9-specific design to clear the 2.5T engine bay).
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (CX-9-specific, 3-piece fender flares with carbon fiber front bumper and rear diffuser) paired with a custom 3M matte vinyl wrap in 'Gunmetal Grey' with gloss black accents on the roof and pillars.

OEM+ aggressive styling with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (CX-9-specific, direct replacement with heat extractors) and a Maxton Design front splitter (CX-9 Gen 2, 3-piece adjustable for downforce tuning) with integrated LED DRLs from LUX Automotive.

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 +25 front and 20x11.5 +35 rear (CX-9-specific offsets) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear) and custom center caps featuring the Mazda rotary logo in red anodized aluminum.
